short_description.value: A multi-temporal geospatial foundation model trained on 4.2M global time series samples from NASA?s Harmonized Landsat and Sentinel-2 data archive at 30m resolution. Incorporates temporal and location embeddings for enhanced performance across diverse EO tasks. Available in 300M and 600M parameter versions.

masking_strategy.value: Random masking of 3D spatiotemporal patches with drop mechanism for geolocation and temporal metadata

pretraining.value: Self-supervised masked autoencoding with 3D patch embeddings and 3D positional encodings, incorporating temporal and location metadata as weighted positional biases. Trained on global HLS time series at 30m resolution.

value.value: Addition of temporal and location metadata as weighted positional biases
Random drop of metadata during pretraining
Global (excluding persistent quality issues in Greenland and Antarctica)

learning_rate.value: cosine scheduler, max 5e-4, linear warmup from 1e-6 for 40 epochs

sampling.value: Stratified by LULC and ecoregion, upsampling of urban and heterogeneous areas, temporal sequence sampling (4 timestamps, 1-6 months apart)

cloud_cover.value: Max 20% cloudy pixels per sample; sea/desert regions downsampled to 10%

missing_data.value: Max 1% missing pixels per band; filled by nearest interpolation

application.value: Land use/land cover, crop type, object detection

dataset.value: GEO-Bench (m-bigearthnet, m-so2sat, m-brick-kiln, m-forestnet, m-eurosat, m-pv4ger)
GEO-Bench (m-pv4ger-seg, m-chesapeake-landcover, m-cashew-plantation, m-SA-crop-type, m-nz-cattle, m-NeonTree)

application.value: Multi-temporal land cover and crop classification (EU)

dataset.value: FLUXNET, AmeriFlux, ICOS (with HLS and MERRA-2)
